_comment: The Config·JSON value for the self-training loop. labeled_seed / unlabeled_pool / test_set are s3-ref values (typed s3-ref so they wire into the Train Model + pseudo_label dir inputs — a json value cannot wire into an s3-ref port). target_acc / conf_threshold / max_rounds are scalar loop knobs. On the canvas: Config·JSON → flow.loop[ train → pseudo_label → select_confident → merge ] → Notify. The connect-stack SageMaker exec role reads s3://try-conduit-app/examples/* directly; data elsewhere must live under a conduit-* bucket (or widen the exec role + redeploy the connect stack).

_loop_config._comment: How this wires into the flow.loop node on the canvas. The loop body is train → pseudo_label → select_confident → merge; merge is the body's sink and carries model + metrics forward. Each round the loop re-feeds the updated `labeled` + `pool` vars into the next iteration's train + pseudo_label. The loop halts when test accuracy clears target_acc OR maxRounds is hit. (NOTE: registering the FINAL model into the Model Registry after the loop ends is a FOLLOW-ON — not in this example.)
